findings.description: The URL in the PDF is rendered as a hyperlink in the source but appears as plain text in the HTML without an anchor tag.
findings.evidence: PDF contains a clickable hyperlink to http://deq.nc.gov/about/divisions/water-resources/planning/basin-planning/map-page/cape-fear-river-basin-landing/jordan-lake-water-supply-allocation/jordan-lake-water-supply-allocation-round-4. The HTML renders this as plain text without an <a> tag. Similarly, the email address jla4-cfrwse@lists.ncmail.net and the two 'here' links for meeting maps are not hyperlinked in the HTML.

findings.description: The HTML contains nested <main> elements, which duplicates the structural wrapper.
findings.evidence: The HTML has <main> inside another <main> element. While this doesn't duplicate content text, it is a structural duplication.

findings.description: The subtitle 'Jordan Lake Water Supply Allocations and Cape Fear Water Supply Evaluation' is marked as h2 in the HTML, but in the PDF it functions as a subtitle/topic line rather than a separate section heading. This is an acceptable structural choice but worth noting.
findings.evidence: PDF: 'Jordan Lake Water Supply Allocations and Cape Fear Water Supply Evaluation' appears as a subtitle. HTML: rendered as <h2>.
